# Prisma

> Prisma is a next-generation Node.js and TypeScript ORM that unlocks a new level of developer experience when working with databases thanks to its intuitive data model, automated migrations, type-safety & auto-completion.

## Getting Started

- [What is Prisma ORM?](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/overview/introduction/what-is-prisma): Overview of Prisma ORM and its components
- [Why Prisma ORM?](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/overview/introduction/why-prisma): Motivation for Prisma's design approach
- [Quickstart](https://www.prisma.io/docs/getting-started/quickstart-sqlite): Get started with Prisma in 5 minutes with SQLite
- [Setup Prisma ORM](https://www.prisma.io/docs/getting-started/setup-prisma): Add Prisma to an existing project

## Prisma ORM

- [Prisma Schema](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-schema): Define your data model using Prisma Schema Language (PSL)
- [Data sources](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-schema/overview/data-sources): Configure database connections
- [Generators](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-schema/overview/generators): Configure code generators
- [Data model](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-schema/data-model): Models, fields, types, and relations
- [Relations](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-schema/data-model/relations): One-to-one, one-to-many, many-to-many relationships
- [Prisma Client](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-client): Auto-generated type-safe query builder
- [CRUD](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-client/queries/crud): Create, Read, Update, Delete operations
- [Filtering and Sorting](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-client/queries/filtering-and-sorting): Filter and sort query results
- [Select fields](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-client/queries/select-fields): Control which fields to return
- [Relation queries](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-client/queries/relation-queries): Query related data with include and select
- [Aggregation, grouping and summarizing](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-client/queries/aggregation-grouping-summarizing): Aggregate and group data
- [Transactions](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-client/queries/transactions): Execute multiple operations atomically
- [Raw database access](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-client/queries/raw-database-access): Execute raw SQL queries
- [Full-text search](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-client/queries/full-text-search): Full-text search capabilities
- [Client extensions](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-client/client-extensions): Extend Prisma Client with custom methods
- [Middleware](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-client/client-extensions/middleware): Add custom logic before/after queries
- [Logging](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-client/observability-and-logging/logging): Configure logging levels
- [Error handling](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/reference/error-reference): Prisma error types and handling
- [Prisma Migrate](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-migrate): Database schema migrations
- [Migrate Dev](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-migrate/workflows/development-and-production): Development and production migration workflows
- [Seeding](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/prisma-migrate/workflows/seeding): Seed your database with test data
- [Prisma CLI](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/reference/prisma-cli-reference): CLI commands reference

## Supported Databases

- [PostgreSQL](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/overview/databases/postgresql): PostgreSQL database connector
- [MySQL](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/overview/databases/mysql): MySQL database connector
- [SQLite](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/overview/databases/sqlite): SQLite database connector
- [Microsoft SQL Server](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/overview/databases/sql-server): SQL Server database connector
- [MongoDB](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/overview/databases/mongodb): MongoDB database connector
- [CockroachDB](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/overview/databases/cockroachdb): CockroachDB database connector

## Guides

- [Prisma with Next.js](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/nextjs): Use Prisma in Next.js applications
- [Prisma with Express](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/express): Use Prisma with Express.js
- [Prisma with NestJS](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/nestjs): Use Prisma with NestJS
- [Prisma with Nuxt](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/nuxt): Use Prisma with Nuxt
- [Prisma with Remix](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/remix): Use Prisma with Remix
- [Prisma with Fastify](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/fastify): Use Prisma with Fastify
- [Prisma with Hono](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/hono): Use Prisma with Hono
- [Prisma with SvelteKit](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/sveltekit): Use Prisma with SvelteKit
- [Prisma with Elysia](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/elysia): Use Prisma with Elysia
- [Deployment to Vercel](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/deployment/deploying-to-vercel): Deploy Prisma apps to Vercel
- [Deployment to Netlify](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/deployment/deploying-to-netlify): Deploy Prisma apps to Netlify
- [Deployment to AWS Lambda](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/deployment/deploying-to-aws-lambda): Deploy Prisma apps to AWS Lambda
- [Authentication](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/auth): Authentication patterns with Prisma
- [Testing](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/testing): Testing Prisma-based applications
- [Troubleshooting](https://www.prisma.io/docs/guides/troubleshooting): Common issues and solutions

## Prisma Postgres

- [Overview](https://www.prisma.io/docs/postgres/overview): Prisma-hosted serverless PostgreSQL
- [Getting Started](https://www.prisma.io/docs/postgres/getting-started): Get started with Prisma Postgres
- [Connection management](https://www.prisma.io/docs/postgres/connection-management): Connection pooling and management

## Prisma Accelerate

- [Overview](https://www.prisma.io/docs/accelerate/overview): Global database cache and connection pooling
- [Getting Started](https://www.prisma.io/docs/accelerate/getting-started): Set up Prisma Accelerate

## Prisma Pulse

- [Overview](https://www.prisma.io/docs/pulse/overview): Real-time database subscriptions
- [Getting Started](https://www.prisma.io/docs/pulse/getting-started): Set up Prisma Pulse

## Reference

- [Prisma Client API](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/reference/prisma-client-reference): Full Prisma Client API reference
- [Prisma Schema Reference](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/reference/prisma-schema-reference): Prisma Schema Language specification
- [Prisma CLI Reference](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/reference/prisma-cli-reference): CLI commands and options
- [Environment variables](https://www.prisma.io/docs/orm/more/development-environment/environment-variables): Environment variable configuration

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://www.prisma.io/docs/llms-full.txt): Full Prisma documentation for LLM consumption
- [Blog](https://www.prisma.io/blog): Prisma blog posts and tutorials
- [GitHub](https://github.com/prisma/prisma): Prisma source code
